name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing cashless secondary and tertiary care hospitalization to vulnerable families.

eligibility.occupation: Vulnerable categories: ragpickers, street vendors, domestic workers, construction laborers

benefits: Covers 3 days pre and 15 days post hospitalization

name: PM-JAY Senior Citizens (70+)
description: Universal health coverage extension for all Indian senior citizens aged 70 years and above.
benefits: ₹5L shared cover if already in PM-JAY

name: Rashtriya Arogya Nidhi (RAN)
description: Financial assistance for BPL patients suffering from life-threatening diseases requiring expensive treatment.

eligibility.condition: Cancer, Kidney failure, Cardiac, Liver diseases

name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
description: Health screening and treatment for children from birth to 18 years including 4D conditions.
benefits: Treatment for 4D conditions (Defects at birth, Diseases, Deficiency, Development)

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
description: Cash assistance to pregnant women for institutional delivery.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana - Mizoram
description: Enhanced JSY for institutional deliveries in Mizoram.

name: Dr. YSR Aarogyasri
description: Comprehensive health insurance forBelow Poverty Line families in Andhra Pradesh.

name: KCR Stores (Kalyana Lakshmi & Raji)
description: Government paying ₹5 lakh for girl child marriage/health expenses.

name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY)
description: Health insurance for BPL families in Maharashtra.

name: Swasthya Sathi
description: Comprehensive health insurance for West Bengal residents.

name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS)
description: Comprehensive health insurance for Tamil Nadu residents.

name: Yeshasvini Health Insurance
description: Health insurance for Karnataka farmers and poor.

name: Kerala Ayushman Bharat (KASP)
description: Comprehensive health insurance for Kerala residents.

name: MA Yojana (Madhya Pradesh)
description: Health insurance for residents of Madhya Pradesh.

name: Bhamashah Swasthya Yojana
description: Health insurance scheme for Rajasthan families.

name: Biju Swasthya Yojana (BSKY)
description: Comprehensive health insurance for Odisha residents.

name: Godhan Nyay Yojana
description: Purchase of cow dung from farmers for composting.
benefits: Indirect health support via organic farming

name: Atal Amrit Abhiyan (AAA)
description: Free treatment for 6 deadly diseases in Assam.
benefits: Free treatment for Cancer, Kidney, Heart, Neuro, Liver, Burns

name: Meghalaya Health Insurance
description: Basic health cover for Meghalaya residents.

name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana (RSBY)
description: Health insurance for BPL unorganized workers.

name: National Waqf Savings Account
description: Savings account for Waqf properties beneficiaries.

name: Public Fund Management System
description: Direct transfer of government benefits to bank accounts.

name: Ayushman Card Distribution
description: Distribution of Ayushman Cards to eligible families.

name: ABDM - ABHA
description: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission - Health ID for all.

name: PM MNRF (PM-CARES)
description: PM's Citizen Assistance and Relief in Emergency Situations Fund.

name: India Post Payments Bank
description: Zero balance banking for rural India.

name: Stand Up India
description: Loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs.

name: PM SVANidhi
description: Micro credit facility for street vendors.

name: PM Kisan Samman
description: Direct income support to farmer families.

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Credit for farmers at low interest.

name: POSHAN Abhiyaan
description: Nutrition for children and pregnant women.

name: Mid-Day Meal
description: Free hot cooked meal in schools.

name: NSAP - Old Age
description: Old age pension for senior citizens.

name: PM Vishwakarma
description: Skill development loans for traditional artisans.

name: Startup India
description: Tax benefits and funding for startups.

name: Kanyashree
description: Scholarhip for girl students in WB.

name: Ladli Lakshmi - Rajasthan
description: Scheme for girl child in Rajasthan.

name: Tamil Nadu Free Medicine
description: Free medicines in TN government hospitals.

name: Delhi Free Medicine
description: Free medicines in Delhi government clinics.

name: Rashtriya Netra Jyoti
description: Free cataract surgery for below poverty line.

name: National Cancer Grid
description: Free diagnostic and treatment for cancer.

name: National AIDS Control
description: Free ARV therapy for HIV patients.

name: National Oral Health
description: Free dental treatment in government facilities.

name: Cardiac Care Programme
description: Free cardiac treatment in empaneled centers.

name: NPCDCS - Diabetes/ Hypertension
description: Free treatment for diabetes and hypertension.

name: National Palliative Care
description: Free palliative care for terminally ill.

name: PMBJP - Jan Aushadhi
description: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana - Generic medicine stores.

name: ABHA - Ayushman Bharat Health Account
description: 14-digit unique health ID for citizens to access health records digitally.

name: ABDM - Health Records
description: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission - storing and accessing health records digitally.

name: NHCX - Claims Exchange
description: National Health Claims Exchange - digitized insurance claims processing.
